WTF IS MOG?

$MOG is the internet’s first culture coin.

But it’s more than just a coin, it’s tokenized winning. $MOG is effortless cosmic domination and unadulterated success distilled into computer photons, wrapped into erc- 20 tokens, and placed directly on the Ethereum blockchain. Mog is a movement, it is a way of life. Since day one, Mog has built its community organically from the ground-up with one goal in mind: to be a culture-defining force in the crypto ecosystem.
